requirement_source: PRD: orvex-studio-mcp (post-split repoint) — slug k1sWjtJq3x (canonical); Architecture: orvex-studio-mcp (post-split) — slug BE0jTNoweS (canonical); ADR 0001 — lR3kpc0Ra2 (draft)

sources.title: ADR 0001 — MCP /v1 client regeneration + ask→ai upstream (contracts-pinned)

epics.title: [EPIC] mcp: MCP protocol surface & tool discovery

stories.title: [mcp] Streamable-HTTP + stdio server core with connect-time instructions & authoring-guide resource
[mcp] Curated hero surface (≤~13 eager tools) + list_tools(category?) progressive disclosure
[mcp] whoami: verified principal + capability probe in one round-trip
[mcp] DfM-only agent contract: reject raw markdown, opaque-node handle passthrough

epics.title: [EPIC] mcp: Wiki verb shim — read ladder & write chokepoint

stories.title: [mcp] get_page read ladder (info→outline→blocks) + locator ergonomics
[mcp] save_page/edit write chokepoint: CAS ifVersion→409, verified receipt, 402 QUOTA verbatim
[mcp] get_changes pull-based on the caller's scoped token (no SSE, no admin token)
[mcp] get_space_tree & get_neighborhood navigation shim
[mcp] R0 wiki-api base-URL repoint: env rename + purge stale legacy hosts
[mcp] Contracts-tag codegen: fail-loud typed client + one deliberate /v1 regeneration
[mcp] ask → orvex-studio-ai upstream: resolveAsk routing, K5 passthrough, no fallback
[mcp] search/related/neighborhood → orvex-studio-knowledge direct (D-M8)

epics.title: [EPIC] mcp: Auth edge & token trust boundary

stories.title: [mcp] TS verifier binding: multi-issuer JWKS → claims/aud/frozen-claim → deny-by-default scope gate → principal
[mcp] Introspection cache + FR-C13 conformance vector suite as CI release gate
[mcp] Token pass-through: caller token verbatim on every upstream, no service credential
[mcp] Human-gated actions transport-only: needs_human_*, RATIFY/CONFIRM verbatim, never promote
[mcp] stdio auth-posture parity + resource standing audit gate

epics.title: [EPIC] mcp: Statelessness, revocation consumer & day-1 cell contract

stories.title: [mcp] Stateless shim: no DB, bounded principal-independent caches, jti window retires at R1
[mcp] Raw in-process Kafka revocation consumer → deny-list apply (ADR-0013)
[mcp] Day-1 cell contract: CELL_ID/CLUSTER_NAME, /healthz echo, orvexcell fail-closed, cell-scoped topic
[mcp] ADR-0020 cell-discovery routing — VERIFY + harden discover-once-pin / 308 / 421 self-heal / SOLO_CELL / fail-closed errors

epics.title: [EPIC] mcp: Studio product tools & MCP memory-retrieval surface

stories.title: [mcp] Six studio_* product tools with caller-token pass-through + fail-closed scope gate
[mcp] Re-home marketplace_search/skill_get onto knowledge (Decision 4 / C21)
[mcp] MCP memory-retrieval surface: memory read as a knowledge tool call (AD-5b, I-4)

epics.title: [EPIC] mcp: Golden-tape KPI, operability & wrapper decommission

stories.title: [mcp] Golden-tape KPI eval harness (≤2 calls / ≤~1k tokens) with committed fixtures, CI release gate
[mcp] Operability: /health + /healthz, OTel/Prometheus SLIs, shim-overhead + revocation-lag SLI to LGTM
[mcp] AGPL-import guard in CI + typed-degradation posture (never fail open)
[mcp] Decommission embedded packages/orvex-mcp (73→parity) via FR-C5 ledger + ADR-0004 tier split
